title: Income Tax Department Releases Key Updates on ITR Filing & Tax Audit for AY 2026-27
content:
# Income Tax Department Releases Key Updates on ITR Filing & Tax Audit for AY 2026-27

Ek important update hai taxpayers aur professionals ke liye! Income Tax Department ne Assessment Year (AY) 2026-27 (Financial Year 2025-26) ke liye Income Tax Return (ITR) filing aur Tax Audit Report se related FAQs aur utilities ko update kiya hai, signaling the official commencement of the filing process.

Here are the key takeaways from the recent updates:

*   **Applicable Law:** For AY 2026-27 (income earned in FY 2025-26), the **Income Tax Act, 1961**, will continue to apply. The new Income Tax Act, 2025, will be applicable from Tax Year 2026-27 onwards (i.e., income earned from April 1, 2026) for filing in AY 2027-28.
*   **ITR Forms Enabled:** Department ne ITR-1 (Sahaj) aur ITR-4 (Sugam) forms ke liye Excel utilities e-filing portal par enable kar di hain. Taxpayers ab offline utilities download karke, forms fill karke aur JSON file upload karke apni returns file kar sakte hain. Other ITR forms (ITR-2, ITR-3, etc.) under the Income Tax Act, 1961, will also be notified and made available.
*   **Tax Audit Report Forms:** For AY 2026-27, the existing Forms 3CA, 3CB, aur 3CD (under the Income Tax Act, 1961) hi applicable rahenge. Naya Form No. 26, jo Income Tax Act, 2025 ke under hai, Tax Year 2026-27 se लागू hoga.
*   **Important Due Dates (Expected):**
    *   **ITR Filing (Non-Audit Cases - ITR-1 & ITR-2):** July 31, 2026
    *   **ITR Filing (Non-Audit Cases - ITR-3 & ITR-4):** August 31, 2026
    *   **Tax Audit Report Submission:** September 30, 2026
    *   **ITR Filing (Audit Cases):** October 31, 2026
    *   **ITR Filing (Transfer Pricing Cases):** November 30, 2026

Taxpayers ko salah di jaati hai ki woh apni returns timely file karein to avoid penalties and interest.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/news-e-campaigns)

*Published on: 17 May 2026*
